description: Create a content slide with a left sidebar question and statement, and a right-side horizontal bar chart ranking markets by likely vs unlikely views on whether a four-day working week will become normal.

header.headline: It will become normal for businesses in my country to implement a four-day working week
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

sidebar.body: It will become normal for businesses in my country to implement a four-day working week

footer.source: Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries. Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024 © Ipsos Predictions 2025 Report
